name: Notion
description: Notion is an all-in-one workspace for notes, databases, wikis, and project management. The API lets you create and update pages, query and create databases, search across a workspace, and read page content blocks programmatically.

capabilities.name: create_page
capabilities.description: Create a new page in Notion as a child of a specified parent page or database, with properties and content blocks.

capabilities.name: query_database
capabilities.description: Query a Notion database with filters and sorts to retrieve matching pages and their property values.

capabilities.name: search
capabilities.description: Search across all pages and databases in the workspace that the integration has access to, by title or content.

capabilities.name: update_page
capabilities.description: Update the properties of an existing Notion page, such as changing status, title, or custom property values.

capabilities.name: create_database
capabilities.description: Create a new database as a child of a specified parent page, defining its property schema and title.

capabilities.name: get_block_children
capabilities.description: Retrieve the content blocks that are children of a specific block or page, enabling you to read page content.
